character_designs.name_cn: 赫连雪岱多状态角色板
character_designs.identity: 24-year-old high-ranking white-bear-clan female guard, Lu Mi's close protector and clan ritual enforcer

body_and_face.age_lock: Around 24, visibly adult female high-ranking guard.
body_and_face.species_lock: Human face first with a powerful broad northern female structure: heavy brow ridge, compressed cheekbones, strong jawline, thick straight nose bridge, real biological bear ears, bear-clan facial markings, subtle white sideburn fur, large guard body, and short claws; never bear-face beast head.
body_and_face.rank_lock: High-ranking tribal female warrior guard, clean complete noble equipment, controlled blocking posture, and executioner-like authority; not low-ranking tribesperson or rough common fighter.
body_and_face.build: About 2.02-2.1 m tall and 125-155 kg; broad shoulders, strong neck, heavy forearms, large hands, and stable stance.
body_and_face.expression: Narrow, predatory, blade-sharp stare with calm murderous restraint; severe, oppressive, observant, and rank-aware.

constant_anchors: human face with heavy brow ridge, compressed cheekbones, strong jawline, and thick straight nose bridge
round biological bear ears rooted into the upper temporal sides of the skull, with white outer fur and pale grey inner ear
bear-clan facial markings on cheeks and forehead
narrow deep brown eyes with faint ice-blue cold light and murderous guard stare
rawhide belt and red oath cord

state_designs.silhouette: High-ranking female bear-clan guard with oppressive human face, biological bear ears and facial markings, white fur mantle over silver-black armor, tower shield and guard axe held in formal rest.
Fur mantle strapped down, shield forward, guard axe ready, heavy boots planted, movement stable and weighty rather than deer-rider agile.
Same high-ranking guard body with bone-gold edge, jade clasp chain, red oath cord, small bonewood command token, and formal executioner-like blocking posture.

detail_panels: oppressive human face with heavy brow, strong jaw, biological bear ears, bear-clan facial markings, and narrow deep-brown ice-lit murderous eyes
bear ear root and facial marking close-up showing skull attachment, inner ear, fur flow, and skin transition
narrow predatory eye close-up under heavy brow ridge
large forearm and hand with short claws
bronze bracer, bone toggles, jade clasp, red oath cord
bone-iron tower shield with old scratches and bear-claw cuts as material marks, not a badge
long-handled guard axe or short breaching axe
material swatches of white bear fur, silver-black bone iron, black iron, bronze, dark brown leather, ice-grey thick weave, jade green, bonewood, dark red oath cord, snow dust
negative_rules: ordinary human with decorative bear-ear headband
